message:
🐛 Fix stale agent closure in startMission/executeMission callbacks (#4228) (#4234)

The startMission and executeMission callbacks captured selectedAgent and
defaultAgent via closure but did not include them in their useCallback
dependency arrays. This caused missions to be sent to a previously
selected agent when the user changed their agent selection.

Use useRef to track the latest values of selectedAgent and defaultAgent,
following the existing pattern used for missionsRef, activeMissionIdRef,
and isSidebarOpenRef in the same file. This ensures callbacks always
read the current agent selection without needing to be re-created.

Also updated the retryMission and sendMessage callbacks to use the same
ref pattern for consistency, removing selectedAgent from their dependency
arrays to avoid unnecessary callback re-creation.

Fixes #4228

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
